_comment: Paper broker ledger. broker.sh paper paths read/write this file instead of returning hard-coded stubs. Equity = starting_capital + sum(realised_pnl) + unrealised (fetched live). Positions array drives positions subcommand and gate-check sector-concentration check.

closed_trades.exit_reason: hard-cut breach (-8.28% from entry); Apr 30 close 2,990 < hard-cut 3,031. broker.sh sell filled at stale entry-price (yfinance blocked since Apr 21); ledger corrected to Apr 30 verified close mark.

Q1 2026 print confirmed material miss (net US$55.7M, -16% YoY); pre-commit thesis-break trigger fires. broker.sh sell filled at stale entry-price (yfinance blocked since Apr 21); ledger corrected to WebSearch-verified mark IDR 24,150 (below hard-cut 24,250 — hard-cut breach concurrent with thesis-break).

_trial_note: Trial starts 2026-04-20. Positions array will be populated by broker.sh paper buy on first market-open execution. Cash will decrease by position cost on each buy.
